name: launch_impact
short_description: Issues an error that you can not run this command
full_help:
launch_impact

Description: 
Issues an error that you can not run this command

Syntax: 
launch_impact  [-run <arg>] [-ipf <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-run]      Implemented run to launch iMPACT with
  [-ipf]      Project for iMPACT
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
ToolLaunch

arguments.description: Implemented run to launch iMPACT with
Suspend message limits during command execution
